_comment: Merge this into the .claude/settings.json of any repo you open through Drydock. The daemon injects DRYDOCK_SESSION_ID and DRYDOCK_DAEMON_URL into the session's environment; this hook pipes Claude Code's PreToolUse payload to the daemon and returns the daemon's decision verbatim. curl's -m 590 keeps us just under Claude Code's ~600s hook ceiling so the daemon always resolves first. Widen the matcher (e.g. "Bash|Write|Edit|WebFetch") to gate more tools.
